- [x] ✅ Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] ✅ Clarify Project Requirements
	Project: Rust-based unified CLI tool for Omne blockchain ecosystem orchestration

- [x] ✅ Scaffold the Project
	✅ Complete Rust CLI project structure created with:
	- Cargo.toml with comprehensive dependencies
	- Main CLI entry point with clap command structure
	- Five command modules: network, validator, dev, infrastructure, ops
	- Configuration management system
	- Utility functions for UI and validation
	- Proper module organization and error handling

- [x] ✅ Customize the Project
	✅ Project customized with comprehensive Omne ecosystem features:
	- Network management commands (bootstrap, status, upgrade, health)
	- Validator operations with infrastructure services integration
	- Developer tools with project scaffolding and SDK management
	- Infrastructure service management (OMP, ORC-20, EEC-4337)
	- Operations and monitoring with backup, upgrade, and optimization
	- Full configuration system supporting all networks and services

- [x] ✅ Install Required Extensions
	✅ No additional extensions required for Rust CLI project

- [x] ✅ Compile the Project
	✅ Project compiles successfully:
	- All dependencies resolved automatically
	- Fixed compilation errors (lifetime issues, unused variables)
	- Release build completed successfully
	- CLI binary tested and working

- [x] ✅ Create and Run Task
	✅ No tasks required for CLI project - direct cargo commands sufficient

- [x] ✅ Launch the Project
	✅ Project successfully tested:
	- CLI binary runs correctly
	- All subcommands working properly
	- Interactive outputs with progress bars and styling

- [x] ✅ Ensure Documentation is Complete
	✅ Documentation completed:
	- Comprehensive README.md created with installation, usage, and development guides
	- Complete command reference and configuration documentation
	- Revenue model and troubleshooting sections included
	- Project structure and contribution guidelines added
	- Copilot instructions file cleaned and finalized
